metadata.title: Sneaking Up Mid for a Surprise Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
A quick mid push with steady aim turns this round around. Sometimes the best plays come from patience and timing.
What’s your favorite mid spot to catch enemies off guard?

Share your clutch moments below!

Drop your best clutch plays in the comments!
